markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss blog performance, address indexing issues, and strategize content improvements for Firework's website.](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant indexing issues discovered, likely due to sitemap and canonical tag problems](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Blog performance varies widely, with some posts driving leads while others underperform](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Technical SEO fixes and content strategy refinement are both crucial for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Team to involve SEO expert Dave for additional insights and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Topics

### Indexing and Sitemap Issues

  - [WordPress sitemap hasn't been updated since October 2024, excluding new Webflow blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Many blog posts not properly indexed, affecting visibility and performance](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Cameron proposes manually updating sitemap and fixing canonical tags as short-term solution](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Team agrees to test solution with March blog posts before full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Blog Performance Analysis

  - [March-June performance varied widely (e.g., 80k vs. 0 impressions for different posts)](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [April: 7 new blogs led to 8 leads; May: 2 new blogs led to 3 leads; June: 2 refreshed blogs led to 8 leads](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Overall lead generation from blogs is concerning (e.g., \~0.06 leads per blog in May)](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Older content still driving majority of leads](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on high-performing categories: card podcast, industry verticals (e.g., beauty, luxury), D2C growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Improve CTAs and include relevant lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [A/B testing between pre-trial and book-a-demo CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)

### Technical SEO Concerns

  - [Canonical tag issues identified on important landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Migration from WordPress to Webflow causing complications](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Need for expertise in resolving infrastructure and SEO challenges](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cameron to manually update sitemap with March blog posts and monitor results](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [Jen and Cameron to review canonical tag issues on landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Megan to involve Dave (SEO expert) in next week's call for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Team to analyze blog performance from October 2024 to February 2025 for broader trends](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy while addressing technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [Prioritize sitemap and canonical fixes over new landing page development temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/EWj2xYgpgPWXytGgLewq8bLunPfkrz3x?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
